title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF LIPAY ELEÂ­MENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SOLSONA, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE, TO NALIPSAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 12481 / 65 OG No. 17, 4214 (April 28, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5200, April 27, 1968 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF LIPAY ELEÂMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SOLSONA, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE, TO NALIPSAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Semite and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Lipay Elementary School in the Municipality of Solsona, Province of Ilocos Norte, is hereby change to Nalipsan Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, April 27, 1968.
